scope: plugin_dev plugin plan for the Plugin Development Track
purpose: Turn the plugin_dev phase brief into a machine-readable Evo queue with explicit dependencies, exit criteria, and task-punch coverage.

evolutions.title: Scope lock and architecture confirmation
evolutions.summary: Produce the repo-convention map, architecture boundary map, command-surface outline, and safety rules for plugin_dev before any implementation starts.
evolutions.dependency_notes: First slice. Must review repo conventions before implementation starts.
evolutions.exit_criterion: The plan is agreed and the plugin boundary is explicit.
task_punch_titles: Map repo conventions for plugins, CLI registration, runtime state, docs, and tests
Define the plugin-dev planning dependency map
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover repo analysis and the planning dependency map.
acceptance_criteria: Repo conventions are mapped.
Safe integration points are identified.
The architecture boundary is explicit.
The planning queue is split into safe Evo slices.

evolutions.title: Plugin skeleton and discoverability
evolutions.summary: Create a minimal removable plugin package with metadata, bootstrap/entry wiring, docs, schemas, tests, and read-only status/doctor commands.
evolutions.exit_criterion: plugin_dev loads, is discoverable, and exposes status/doctor safely.
task_punch_titles: Create the plugin shell and manifest
Add status and doctor output only
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover plugin shell creation and read-only discovery output.
acceptance_criteria: Plugin exists as a safe shell with documented purpose.
Status reports plugin state without creating folders.
Doctor reports missing capabilities clearly.

evolutions.title: Core integration with plugin_folder_structure
evolutions.summary: Add workspace lookup, workspace-contract reading, safe delegation checks, and strict refusal to create folders directly.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Workspace validation is delegated to plugin_folder_structure.
task_punch_titles: Create the workspace-contract integration layer
Add workspace ensure/check/status/contract commands
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover contract integration and workspace verification commands.
acceptance_criteria: plugin_folder_structure integration is explicit and read-only at first.
Workspace checks fail closed when the contract is missing or invalid.
plugin_dev does not duplicate workspace creation logic.

evolutions.title: Plugin intake engine
evolutions.summary: Capture the plugin brief, target track, required capabilities, and missing information in the workspace.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Plugin intake is captured only after workspace validation passes.
task_punch_titles: Create the intake reader and intake files
Add generic integration-question capture
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover intake capture and generic integration questioning.
acceptance_criteria: Intake files are created only inside a valid plugin workspace.
Integration needs are captured generically.
Missing details are reported as questions.

evolutions.title: Git library input analyzer
evolutions.summary: Register and analyze Git/library inputs safely with license, security, reuse, and attribution reviews.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Library refs can be registered and analyzed without blind code copying.
task_punch_titles: Register and analyze library inputs
Add license, security, and reuse decision reporting
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover library registration and risk/reuse review.
acceptance_criteria: Library refs can be registered and analyzed.
Unsafe or unknown licenses are flagged.
Security risks are reported.
No unapproved code is copied.

evolutions.title: Plugin specification generator
evolutions.summary: Turn intake and library analysis into a complete plugin specification set.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Approved specs can be generated and validated.
task_punch_titles: Generate the base plugin spec package
Add integration contract sections to the spec
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover spec generation and integration contract documentation.
acceptance_criteria: Specs are generated from intake and analysis.
Integration requirements are written generically.
Missing data blocks later phases.

evolutions.title: Governed task generator
evolutions.summary: Create tasks from approved specs rather than inventing ad hoc work items.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Tasks are generated from specs, not invented ad hoc.
task_punch_titles: Convert specs into a governed task graph
Add integration tasks for declared targets
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover task-graph generation and integration task creation.
acceptance_criteria: Task files are generated from specs.
Integration tasks exist for declared targets.
Integration requirements become visible work items.

evolutions.title: Source builder orchestrator
evolutions.summary: Provide a controlled source builder that writes only inside allowed workspace paths.
evolutions.exit_criterion: A single task can be built safely.
task_punch_titles: Build one task at a time
Emit build reports and changed-file lists
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover task-scoped source building and build evidence.
acceptance_criteria: A single task can be built safely.
Build evidence exists for each task.
Path restrictions are enforced.

evolutions.title: Schema, runtime, and contract validation
evolutions.summary: Check that the plugin is internally consistent before packaging.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Invalid source or contracts are blocked from packaging.
task_punch_titles: Validate manifest, schema, runtime, and command contracts
Validate declared integration contracts read-only
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover validation of the plugin core and integration contracts.
acceptance_criteria: Invalid source or contracts are blocked.
Invalid required integrations block packaging.
Validation is read-only.

evolutions.title: Generic plugin integration builder
evolutions.summary: Provide a reusable integration builder that supports any target plugin slug with contracts, adapters, tests, and evidence.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Generic integrations are generated and validated safely.
task_punch_titles: Add generic integration contracts for any target plugin slug
Generate integration tests and evidence
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover generic integration generation and evidence-backed testing.
acceptance_criteria: Generic integration contracts are generated safely.
Required integration failures block readiness.
Unknown target plugins are handled safely.

evolutions.title: Test runner and quality gate
evolutions.summary: Run plugin tests through existing repo test tooling and gate packaging on quality.
task_punch_titles: Add a plugin-level test plan and runner
Gate packaging on test quality
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover test execution and quality blocking.
acceptance_criteria: Tests can run for a developed plugin.
Failed tests block packaging.
Required integration failures block packaging.

evolutions.title: Evidence and audit trail
evolutions.summary: Write durable evidence records for workspace validation, intake, specs, tasks, source, tests, and integrations.
task_punch_titles: Collect evidence per major phase
Add evidence verification and reporting
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover evidence collection and verification.
acceptance_criteria: Every major phase produces evidence.
Evidence verification detects missing records.
Integration evidence is included.

evolutions.title: Readiness scoring and package gating
evolutions.summary: Compute readiness and gate package build so unready plugins cannot be bundled or promoted.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Readiness is clear and package build is gated safely.
task_punch_titles: Score readiness across all major categories
Gate package build on readiness
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover readiness scoring and package gating.
acceptance_criteria: Readiness gives clear pass/fail.
Packaging is blocked when readiness is below threshold.
Critical categories cannot be bypassed.

evolutions.title: Promotion request workflow
evolutions.summary: Create review artifacts that ask for install, marketplace review, or rework.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Promotion requests are generated without auto-promotion.
task_punch_titles: Generate a formal Owner Track promotion request
Include risks, evidence, and decision options
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover the promotion request and owner decision surface.
acceptance_criteria: Promotion requests are generated without auto-promotion.
Owner Track has clear decision options.
Integration risks are visible.

evolutions.title: Dashboard and status surfaces
evolutions.summary: Show current workspace health without mutating files.
evolutions.exit_criterion: Users can inspect progress without mutating files.
task_punch_titles: Add read-only status and summary outputs
Surface integration and readiness state in the dashboard
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover read-only status and dashboard reporting.
acceptance_criteria: Users can inspect progress without mutating files.
Integration status is visible.
Readiness blockers are visible.

evolutions.title: Documentation and final hardening
evolutions.summary: Explain how the plugin works, document its relationship with plugin_folder_structure, and prove the safety matrix with tests.
evolutions.exit_criterion: The plugin is documented, hardened, and ready for extension.
task_punch_titles: Finalize docs and command references
Add hardening tests for failure and safety cases
evolutions.task_punch_summary: 2 task punches cover documentation and final hardening tests.
acceptance_criteria: The workflow is documented clearly.
The plugin is hardened and test-covered.
Failure cases are blocked safely.
